prompt: A fictional young woman in a black knit cat-ear balaclava and matching cropped tactical top, shot from a dizzying overhead fisheye angle while she stands on an open steel grate platform hundreds of stories above a sprawling metropolis at golden-hour haze. Her expression is calm, unbothered, direct eye contact with the lens despite the vertigo-inducing drop below — a dense grid of skyscrapers, rooftops, and hazy rivers stretching to the horizon. Warm amber sunlight rakes across her collarbone and the knit texture of the hood, while the city below sits in cool blue-grey shadow, creating a warm/cool contrast. Extreme fisheye GoPro-style lens distortion bends the skyline into a bowl shape. Faint reflective etching reading "@OzairSk" is subtly scratched into the metal safety rail beside her boot, barely legible, like worn signage. Hyperrealistic skin texture, shallow catchlights in her eyes, slight film grain, ultra-sharp foreground with soft atmospheric haze in the distance. --ar 9:13
